supply_chain.dependencies: Wide variety of raw materials including plastic resins, precious metals (gold, silver, palladium), and other metals (copper, aluminum, brass, steel). Many raw materials produced in limited number of countries or available from limited number of suppliers.
supply_chain.risks: Raw material availability and price fluctuations, supply chain disruptions, inflationary cost pressures, limited number of suppliers for certain materials, force majeure events affecting feedstock and resins, concentration risk with third-party suppliers and manufacturers

regulatory_risks: EU Restriction of Hazardous Substances (RoHS) Directive compliance
EU Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment (WEEE) Directive compliance
China Administrative Measures for the Restriction of Hazardous Substances (China RoHS) regulation
EU Registration, Evaluation, Authorization, and Restriction of Chemicals (REACH) regulation
Greenhouse gas emissions regulations and global minimum tax requirements
EU Anti-Tax Avoidance Directive
OECD global minimum corporate tax (15%) implementation
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
United Kingdom Bribery Act compliance
Environmental protection and health and safety laws compliance
Product hazardous material content regulations
Circular economy and recycling requirements
Trade compliance and export/import regulations
U.S. Department of Commerce Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) trade controls
U.S. State Department Directorate of Defense Trade Controls (DDTC) regulations
Antitrust and competition laws (U.S. and EU)
Data privacy laws (EU GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act, China Personal Information Protection Law)
Data localization and data residency laws
Conflict minerals regulations (3TG from DRC and adjoining countries)
EU Conflict Minerals Regulation
Climate disclosure rules (SEC Enhancement and Standardization of Climate-Related Disclosures)
Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) commitments

sanction_risks: Military conflicts in certain parts of the world impacting operations
